issue_title: [BUG] Codegen with frame locators uses internal selectors
issue_body: Repro 1. `npx playwright codegen https://www.w3schools.com/tags/tryit.asp?filename=tryhtml_iframe` 2. Click on e.g. "Log in" Expected: selector without internal: prefix Actual: Selector with internal:pref `await page.frameLocator('#iframeResult').frameLocator('internal:attr=[title="W3Schools Free Online Web Tutorials"i]').getByRole('link', { name: 'Log in' }).dblclick();`
pr_title: fix: use no internal selectors for frame locators
